zh.lifeSummary: 當Hildegarde De Thouars於大約1058年出生在法國波特-哈倫斯多武-瑟艾福雷斯瓦爾斯時，她的父親Aimery of Thouars IV36歲，母親Auremgarde Mauleon42歲。她於1065年與Hugh VI of Lusignan Marche VI在法國波特-哈倫斯多武-瑟艾福雷斯瓦爾斯結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1099年12月7日享年42歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Hildegarde De Thouars于大约1058年出生在法国波特-哈倫斯多武-瑟艾福雷斯瓦爾斯时，她的父亲Aimery of Thouars IV36岁，母亲Auremgarde Mauleon42岁。她于1065年与Hugh VI of Lusignan Marche VI在法国波特-哈倫斯多武-瑟艾福雷斯瓦爾斯结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1099年12月7日享年42岁。

nameMeanings.name: De
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Hildegarde
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an old Germanic female personal name composed of hild ‘battle’ + gard ‘enclosure’. It was borne by the second wife of Charlemagne and by the mystical writer Hildegard of Bingen ( 1098–1179 ), in whose music and writings there has been great interest in recent decades.

en.lifeSummary: When Hildegarde De Thouars was born about 1058, in Thouars, Deux-Sèvres, Poitou-Charentes, France, her father, Aimery of Thouars IV, was 36 and her mother, Auremgarde Mauleon, was 42. She married Hugh VI of Lusignan Marche VI in 1065, in Thouars, Deux-Sèvres, Poitou-Charentes, France. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 1 daughter. She died on 7 December 1099, at the age of 42.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Hildegarde De Thouars est née environ 1058, à Thouars, Deux-Sèvres, Poitou-Charentes, France, son père, Aimery of Thouars IV, avait 36 ans et sa mère, Auremgarde Mauleon, avait 42 ans. Elle a épousé Hugh VI of Lusignan Marche VI en 1065, à Thouars, Deux-Sèvres, Poitou-Charentes, France. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée le 7 décembre 1099, à l’âge de 42 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Hildegarde De Thouars um 1058 in Thouars, Deux-Sèvres, Poitou-Charentes, Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Aimery of Thouars IV 36 und ihre Mutter Auremgarde Mauleon 42. Sie hat 1065 in Thouars, Deux-Sèvres, Poitou-Charentes, Frankreich Hugh VI of Lusignan Marche VI geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb am 7. Dezember 1099 im Alter von 42 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Hildegarde De Thouars è nata il circa 1058 nel Thouars, Deux-Sèvres, Poitou-Charentes, Francia, sua padre, Aimery of Thouars IV, aveva 36 anni e sua madre, Auremgarde Mauleon, aveva 42 anni. Lei sposato Hugh VI of Lusignan Marche VI nel 1065, nel Thouars, Deux-Sèvres, Poitou-Charentes, Francia. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 1 figlia. Morì il 7 dicembre 1099, all'età di 42 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Hildegarde De Thouarsが約1058年にフランスポイトウ-チャーエンツデウクス-スevレスソウアルズで生まれた時，父Aimery of Thouars IVは36歳，母Auremgarde Mauleonは42歳であった。1065年にフランスポイトウ-チャーエンツデウクス-スevレスソウアルズでHugh VI of Lusignan Marche VIと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1099年12月7日に42歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Hildegarde De Thouars(이)가 대략 1058년 프랑스 포이토우-처츠 데우스-스e브레스 토우아르스에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Aimery of Thouars IV(은)는 36세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Auremgarde Mauleon(은)는 42세였다. 그녀는 1065년 프랑스 포이토우-처츠 데우스-스e브레스 토우아르스에서 Hugh VI of Lusignan Marche VI(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1099년 12월 7일 42세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Hildegarde De Thouars nasceu aproximadamente 1058, em Thouars, Deux-Sèvres, Poitou-Charentes, França, seu pai, Aimery of Thouars IV, tinha 36 anos e sua mãe, Auremgarde Mauleon, tinha 42 anos. Ela casou-se com Hugh VI of Lusignan Marche VI em 1065, em Thouars, Deux-Sèvres, Poitou-Charentes, França. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 7 de dezembro de 1099, com 42 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Hildegarde De Thouars родилась около 1058 г. в местности тоуарс, деукс-сeвресь, поитоу-чарентесь, Франция, её отцу по имени Aimery of Thouars IV было 36 лет, а матери, которую звали Auremgarde Mauleon, 42. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Hugh VI of Lusignan Marche VI в 1065 г. в местности тоуарс, деукс-сeвресь, поитоу-чарентесь, Франция. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь. Она умерла 7 декабря 1099 г. в возрасте 42 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Hildegarde De Thouars nació aproximadamente 1058, en Thouars, Deux-Sèvres, Poitou-Charentes, Francia, su papá, Aimery of Thouars IV, tenía 36 años y su mamá, Auremgarde Mauleon, tenía 42 años. Se casó con Hugh VI of Lusignan Marche VI en 1065, en Thouars, Deux-Sèvres, Poitou-Charentes, Francia. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 1 hija. Murió el 7 de diciembre de 1099, a la edad de 42 años.
